explanations.3: This creates a 'finder' object that will search for PHP files to check, starting from the current directory but skipping the folders listed below.
explanations.13: This reads the contents of a license header file from disk and stores it as a string so it can be added to the top of PHP files.
explanations.21: The rtrim function removes trailing carriage returns and newlines from the header text so it's clean before being inserted into files.
